name: Broiled Shrimp & Scallops (Scampie e Cape Sante Alla Griglia
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp.
2. Wash the shrimp and scallops under cold running water. Pat dry with paper towels.
3. In a large bowl, combine the olive oil, chopped parsley, minced garlic, dry breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Add the shrimp and scallops to the mixture. Mix until well coated.
5. Let stand for 1 hour (marinate).
6. Preheat the broiler.
7. Remove the shrimp and scallops from the marinade. Gently press some extra breadcrumb mixture onto the shrimp and scallops.
8. Place them alternately on 6 metal skewers.
9. Put the skewers under the hot broiler.
10. Broil for 2 minutes or until golden brown on one side.
11. Turn the skewers over and continue broiling for 2 more minutes or until golden brown on the other side.
12. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
